nodes.label: Virtual Synapse Mapping
nodes.rationale: The bet that the 2-3-3-2 layer mapping projects biological dendritic distance-based attenuation/gain without an explicit geometric variable - the whole Ganglion acts as one functional Axon unit, complex multi-synapse behavior mapped into localized analog primitives.

nodes.label: Dynamic Role Switching
nodes.rationale: An un-promoted future-track training mechanism: unit blocks alternate at runtime between Region-Optimization mode (L2 settles boundary coordinates) and Gain-Amplification mode (L3/L4 lock amplification weights) - proposed explanation for a paraboloid-fitting result (one Ganglion cutting loss ~20x under noise without gradient math). Flagged as a §21 Future Track requiring §20.17 promotion, not folded into the locked baseline.
